use_cases: Hero section background with organic flowing particle animation
Landing page backdrop for SaaS and product showcases
Interactive section dividers with customizable color trails
Loading or transition screen visual enhancement
Ambient background for dashboards or app interfaces
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle flow field animation component that generates organic, flowing particle patterns across a background. Features customizable colors, trail opacity effects, configurable particle count, and adjustable animation speed. Creates subtle depth through gradient-colored particles with fading trails. Ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and ambient UI backgrounds where subtle motion adds visual interest without distracting from content.
